storyline.title: The Awakening
storyline.prologue: You awaken in a strange realm with no memory of your past. The villagers speak of an ancient darkness spreading across the land - the Shadow. As you explore, you begin to realize you may be the only one who can stop it.

chapters.title: A Stranger in the Land
chapters.description: Learn about your surroundings, meet the locals, and uncover the first hints of the Shadow.

chapters.title: Gathering Allies
chapters.description: Earn the trust of the realm's inhabitants and prepare to face the growing darkness.

chapters.title: The Shadow Rises
chapters.description: The darkness makes its presence known. Learn the ancient ritual to banish it.

chapters.title: The Final Stand
chapters.description: With allies gathered and the ritual prepared, face the Shadow once and for all.

npc_villager_01.name: Farmer Tom
npc_villager_01.role: Your first friendly face in this world

npc_guard_01.name: Guard Captain
npc_guard_01.role: Suspicious of strangers, must be convinced

npc_healer_01.name: Elder Sage
npc_healer_01.role: Mystic healer with visions of the future

npc_wanderer_01.name: Silent Walker
npc_wanderer_01.role: Has witnessed the Shadow's corruption firsthand
